name: Yet another server
intends:
import asyncio
import signal
import time
import os


class EventTriggers:
    def __init__(self):
        self.proc = None
        self.file = None
        self.spec = ["-m", "60", "--low-power", "off", "--audio"]

        self.output_dir = "./storage"
        os.makedirs(self.output_dir, exist_ok=True)

    def _new_file(self):
        ts = time.strftime("%Y-%m-%d_%H%M%S")
        return f"{self.output_dir}/screencast-{ts}.mp4"

    async def _start(self, extra):
        if self.proc and self.proc.returncode is None:
            return

        self.file = self._new_file()

        self.proc = await asyncio.create_subprocess_exec(
            "wl-screenrec",
            *self.spec,
            *extra,
            "-f",
            self.file,
            stdout=asyncio.subprocess.DEVNULL,
            stderr=asyncio.subprocess.DEVNULL,
        )

    async def onStart(self):
        # start recording
        await self._start([])

    async def onStop(self):
        # stop and save
        if self.proc and self.proc.returncode is None:
            self.proc.send_signal(signal.SIGINT)
            await self.proc.wait()

            if self.file:
                proc = await asyncio.create_subprocess_exec(
                    "notify-send",
                    "-A", "open=Open",
                    "Recording Stopped",
                    f"Saved at {self.file}",
                    stdout=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
                )

                stdout, _ = await proc.communicate()
                action = stdout.decode().strip()

                if action == "open":
                    await asyncio.create_subprocess_exec(
                        "nautilus",
						"/home/hk/prog/vocal-link-dashboard/storage"
                    )

            self.proc = None

    async def onPause(self):
        # pause recording
        if self.proc and self.proc.returncode is None:
            self.proc.send_signal(signal.SIGSTOP)

    async def onResume(self):
        # resume recording
        if self.proc and self.proc.returncode is None:
            self.proc.send_signal(signal.SIGCONT)

    async def onCancel(self):
        # cancel and delete file
        if self.proc and self.proc.returncode is None:
            self.proc.send_signal(signal.SIGTERM)
            await self.proc.wait()

            if self.file and os.path.exists(self.file):
                os.remove(self.file)

            self.proc = None
